title: シンボリルドルフ登場！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Even just the announcement of Symboli Rudolf's
debut race has caused quite a stir in the racing
world, but she herself seems unfazed by the
attention.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She has told me her objectives: first to claim the
Classic Triple Crown, then to cement her status as
the true Emperor with further accolades.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Together, we set out to realize her vision: a world
in which all Umamusume can live in bliss!
